articles.title: Bitget Merges Tokens as BGB Hits Record High Amid Market Downturn
articles.description: Bitget merges its tokens BGB and BWB, pushing BGB to an all-time high of $7.79 amid a broader crypto market downturn.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Donates 88 ETH to Adopt  Moo Deng
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin donates 88 ETH to adopt viral pygmy hippo Moo Deng, boosting zoo support and causing a surge in the MOODENG meme coin's value.
